---
title: Serie A
subtitle: "ITA1 · Transfer Cards · Season 25/26"
listing:
  contents: posts/ita1 
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [title,categories]
  grid-columns: 2
---

```{=html}
<div style="margin:1.5rem 0 2.5rem;">
  <div style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:0.7rem;color:#1DB954;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.8rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.6rem;">
    <span style="display:inline-block;width:20px;height:1px;background:#1DB954;"></span>
    GRE1 · Active Season 25/26
  </div>
  <p style="font-size:0.9rem;line-height:1.7;color:rgba(240,244,255,0.6);max-width:600px;">
    Analytical breakdowns of transfers involving Greek Super League clubs.
    Each card shows the player's difficulty-adjusted percentile ranking,
    projection tier, and per-metric strengths and risks.
  </p>
</div>
```

---
